title: GraphQL Full-Stack Next.js App (Apollo + Prisma)
description: Schema-first full-stack Next.js app with Apollo Server 4, Prisma ORM, authentication, error monitoring, and CI/CD.

steps.description: Initialize a new Next.js project with App Router and TypeScript
Set up styling with Tailwind CSS v4
Set up Prisma ORM with database schema and migrations
Add Apollo Server 4 API route and Apollo Client with typed resolvers
Add authentication and attach session to GraphQL context
Add error monitoring for resolver failures
Set up unit and integration testing
Configure CI/CD with type-check, lint, and test pipeline
